# datadog-cli

> Read-only CLI for querying Datadog APIs. Covers logs, traces, APM, metrics, hosts, monitors, dashboards, SLOs, incidents, RUM, audit, usage, and more.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Installation, quick start, all command groups, output format examples, configuration, supported sites
- [Skill](skill/SKILL.md): Claude Code skill with examples, auth setup, output flags, time formats, global flags reference
- [Commands Reference](skill/reference/commands.md): Complete flag reference for every command and subcommand, required API scopes

## API

All commands are read-only (list/get/search/aggregate only). No write operations.

Authentication via `DD_API_KEY` + `DD_APP_KEY` environment variables, `--api-key`/`--app-key` flags, or `~/.datadog-cli/config.yaml` (profile-based).

Default site: `datadoghq.com`. Override with `DD_SITE` env var or `--site` flag.

## Command Groups

logs, traces, apm, metrics, monitors, hosts, containers, processes, dashboards, events, downtimes, incidents, notebooks, rum, slos, tags, audit, usage, users, pipelines, api-keys, auth

## Key Flags

- `--json` / `-j`: raw JSON output
- `--plaintext` / `-p`: no color, no borders
- `--limit` / `-l`: max results (default 100)
- `--jq EXPR`: apply jq expression to JSON output
- `--fields f1,f2`: show only named columns
- `--from` / `--to`: time range (relative like `1h`, ISO-8601, or unix seconds)
- `--profile`: named profile from config file

## Skill Management

```bash
datadog-cli skill add    # install to ~/.claude/skills/datadog-cli/
datadog-cli skill print  # print SKILL.md to stdout
```
